name: ICML 2026 Sponsors
guide_use_zh: 做逛展优先级和公司索引；赞助商总表约 100 家。
guide_use_en: Use as the expo priority list and company index; sponsor list has about 100 organizations.

name: ICML Career Opportunities
guide_use_zh: 注册后必看；公开页不显示岗位详情。
guide_use_en: Must-check after registration; public page does not expose job details.

name: ICML Recruitment Database
guide_use_zh: 提醒找工作的人先登录 careers，不要只靠线下搭讪。
guide_use_en: Tell job seekers to log into careers first instead of relying only on hallway conversations.

name: Dedicated interview rooms
guide_use_zh: 对 Diamond/Platinum 目标公司提前约面。
guide_use_en: Pre-book interviews with target Diamond/Platinum sponsors.

name: Expo Talks, Demos, Workshops
location: Auditorium, Halls B2/C/D1/D2, Grand Ballroom Foyer
guide_use_zh: 比晚宴更稳定的公司技术入口；适合招聘、产品、研究合作线索。
guide_use_en: More reliable than dinner lists for company tech entry points, recruiting, product, and collaboration leads.

name: Multi-Agent System Design and Evaluation for Quantitative Finance
guide_use_zh: 量化 + multi-agent 方向重点看。
guide_use_en: High-value for quant + multi-agent interests.

name: Reliable and Efficient LLM Outputs with Mellea + Granite OSS Libraries
guide_use_zh: 开源 LLM infra / enterprise AI 实操场。
guide_use_en: Useful for open-source LLM infrastructure and enterprise AI practice.

name: Xiaomi GUI Agent
guide_use_zh: 手机 GUI agent / device AI 方向可看。
guide_use_en: Useful for mobile GUI agents and device AI.

name: AI for International E-Commerce
guide_use_zh: 电商推荐、购物 agent、供应链模型方向可看。
guide_use_en: Useful for e-commerce recommendation, shopping agents, and supply-chain models.

name: RAI Mentoring Circle: Responsible AI for Early Career AI Researchers
guide_use_zh: early-career / responsible AI 单独推荐。
guide_use_en: Recommended for early-career and responsible-AI networking.

name: Welcome Reception
guide_use_zh: 官方社交主场，适合放每日行程。
guide_use_en: Main official social anchor; include in the daily route.

name: LatinX in AI Workshop
guide_use_zh: diversity/community 版块。
guide_use_en: Diversity/community route.

name: WiML Symposium at ICML 2026
guide_use_zh: women/diversity/networking 必收。
guide_use_en: High-value women/diversity/networking event.

name: WiML, Muslims in ML, LatinX, GlobalSouthML Poster Session
guide_use_zh: 适合晚间替代外部饭局。
guide_use_en: Good evening alternative to external dinners.

name: GlobalSouthML @ ICML 2026
guide_use_zh: global south / community。
guide_use_en: Global South / community route.

name: The 6th Muslims in ML Workshop
guide_use_zh: inclusion/community。
guide_use_en: Inclusion/community route.

name: Bridging Research and Open-Source
guide_use_zh: 开源社区 networking。
guide_use_en: Open-source community networking.

name: How to Network at an AI Conference
guide_use_zh: 新手逛会指南强推荐。
guide_use_en: Strong recommendation for first-time conference goers.

name: Robot Learning Social
guide_use_zh: robotics 方向聚集点。
guide_use_en: Robotics networking anchor.

name: Cooperative AI
guide_use_zh: AI safety / multi-agent 社区。
guide_use_en: AI safety / multi-agent community.

name: Town Hall
guide_use_zh: 了解组织方向、提问、找社群入口。
guide_use_en: Understand conference direction, ask questions, and find community entry points.

name: Jane Street
guide_use_zh: Diamond sponsor；官方 blurb 明确招聘取向。
guide_use_en: Diamond sponsor; official blurb signals recruiting interest.

name: IMC
guide_use_zh: Platinum sponsor；明确关注 PhD 和 industry candidates。
guide_use_en: Platinum sponsor; explicitly interested in PhD and industry candidates.

name: Preference Model
guide_use_zh: Silver sponsor；官方 blurb 明确 hiring researchers and engineers。
guide_use_en: Silver sponsor; official blurb explicitly says hiring researchers and engineers.

name: MATS Research
guide_use_zh: AI alignment early researcher / mentors 线索。
guide_use_en: AI alignment early-researcher and mentor lead.
